testcase.name: useQueuedAsyncRetry hook should queue retry request while previous loading hasn't finished
testcase.classname: should queue retry request while previous loading hasn't finished

failure.message:
expected spy to have been called exactly "twice", but it was called once
The following calls were made:
spy() => {} at http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:120900:26

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected spy to have been called exactly "twice", but it was called once
The following calls were made:
at <unknown> ( spy => {} at http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:120900:26) at captureUserInvocationStack (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:131564:102) at Proxy.<anonymous> (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:131592:9) at Proxy.<anonymous> (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:894:18) at Proxy.methodWrapper (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:78829:25) at Context.<anonymous> (/Users/anch/develop/sematic/sematic/ui/src/hooks/tests/helperHook.cy.tsx:43:38) at getRet (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135685:20) at tryCatcher (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:8914:23) at Promise.attempt.Promise.try (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:6188:29) at Context.thenFn (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135696:63) at Context.then (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135945:21)
